title: 1995 Georgian presidential election
summary: Presidential elections were held in Georgia on 5 November (or 6 November) 1995. The result was a victory for Eduard Shevardnadze of the Union of Citizens of Georgia, who received 77% of the vote, with a 68% turnout.
text:
Presidential elections were held in Georgia on 5 November (or 6 November) 1995. The result was a victory for Eduard Shevardnadze of the Union of Citizens of Georgia, who received 77% of the vote, with a 68% turnout.
